highLegibilityFont.title: Font for the real ones
highLegibilityFont.desc: Swap the basic font for one that's actually readable

useMaterialTheming.title: Material Design vibes
useMaterialTheming.desc: Theme the whole app based on Material rules (might be a bit much for the eyes)

themeIsAmoled.title: Pure Black / AMOLED
themeIsAmoled.desc: Go full pitch black in dark mode. Saves your screen and looks fire.

themeIsVibrant.title: Vibrant Aesthetic
themeIsVibrant.desc: Add more color to the UI.
